description: HDMI 1.4b to MIPI DSI bridge IC (Ultra HD to DSI), up to 4K x 2K 30fps, dual-link MIPI DSI Tx 1Gbps/lane, 80-pin VFBGA P-VFBGA80-0707-0.65-001

key_performance.hdmi_input: HDMI 1.4b (up to 297 MHz TMDS clock, 7.2 Gbps stream)
key_performance.mipi_output: MIPI DSI Tx (dual-link DSI0 + DSI1), each up to 4 data lanes, 1 Gbps/lane
key_performance.dual_link_max: 4K x 2K @ 30fps (4096 pixels wide) with dual link
key_performance.i2c_addresses: 0x0F (INT low at boot) or 0x1F (INT high at boot)

pins.name: DVDD33
pins.description: 3.3V HDMI RX analog supply. 100nF + 10uF to GND.

pins.name: TMDS_D2P
pins.description: TMDS Data Lane 2 Positive

pins.name: TMDS_D2N
pins.description: TMDS Data Lane 2 Negative

pins.name: GND
pins.description: Ground

pins.name: TMDS_D1P
pins.description: TMDS Data Lane 1 Positive

pins.name: TMDS_D1N
pins.description: TMDS Data Lane 1 Negative

pins.name: GND
pins.description: Ground

pins.name: DVDD33
pins.description: 3.3V supply (second pin)

pins.name: GND
pins.description: Ground

pins.description: TMDS Data Lane 0 Positive

pins.name: TMDS_D0N
pins.description: TMDS Data Lane 0 Negative

pins.name: GND
pins.description: Ground

pins.name: TMDS_CLKP
pins.description: TMDS Clock Positive

pins.name: TMDS_CLKN
pins.description: TMDS Clock Negative

pins.name: DDC_SCL
pins.description: DDC I2C clock to HDMI connector DDC SCL

pins.name: DDC_SDA
pins.description: DDC I2C data to HDMI connector DDC SDA

pins.name: HPD
pins.description: Hot Plug Detect output to HDMI connector. Drive high when ready.

pins.name: REXT
pins.description: External bias resistor. Connect 4.7kOhm to GND.

pins.name: AVDD12
pins.description: 1.2V analog PLL supply. 100nF + 1uF to GND. Keep separate from VDD12.

pins.name: AVDD12
pins.description: 1.2V analog supply (second pin)

pins.name: CEC
pins.description: HDMI CEC (optional). Leave NC if not used.

pins.name: SCL
pins.description: I2C clock from host (STM32 PB6). 4.7kOhm pull-up to VDDIO18.

pins.name: SDA
pins.description: I2C data to/from host (STM32 PB7). 4.7kOhm pull-up to VDDIO18.

pins.name: INT
pins.description: INT output (active-low, open-drain) to STM32 PA9. At boot: selects I2C addr (low=0x0F, hi=0x1F). 10kOhm pull-up to VDDIO18.

pins.name: RESET_N
pins.description: Active-low async reset from STM32 PA8. Drive low >=100us to reset.

pins.name: HDMI5V
pins.description: HDMI +5V detect (HDMI pin 18 via 47k/10k divider to this pin)

pins.name: VDDIO18
pins.description: 1.8V IO supply. 100nF + 10uF to GND.

pins.name: VDDIO18
pins.description: IO supply (second pin)

pins.name: VDD12
pins.description: 1.2V digital core supply. 100nF + 10uF to GND.

pins.description: 1.2V digital core supply (second pin)

pins.description: Ground

required_passives.reason: Pull-up; low at boot = I2C addr 0x0F

notes: OUTPUT IS MIPI DSI (display interface) -- NOT CSI-2. Package: P-VFBGA80-0707-0.65-001 BGA 7x7mm 0.65mm pitch -- requires 4-layer PCB with BGA via fanout. Single 4-lane DSI (use DSI0 only, CDSI0D0-D3 + CDSI0CLK) covers 1080p60. Dual-link (DSI0+DSI1) for 4K30. Power sequence: DVDD33 first, then VDD12+VDDIO18. I2C addr: INT=low at boot gives 0x0F. REXT 4.7kOhm is mandatory. AVDD12 must be separate low-noise supply.
